name: exam-generator
description: 试卷生成器，基于知识库与约束生成试题、LaTeX 试卷和答题卡。

interface.shortDescription: Generate exams and answer sheets from a knowledge base
interface.longDescription: Generate professional exams from source materials and constraints, then render them through bundled LaTeX templates.
defaultPrompt: 根据知识库和约束生成一套试卷，并输出可编译的 LaTeX 文件。
